# Stakgod

> Stakgod is an AI app builder. Users describe an app in chat; Claude generates and deploys a working web app. Each generated app gets 16 baked-in BaaS primitives auto-injected as `window.sg.*` (auth, db, AI chat/image, payments, file uploads, transactional email, web push, geo, cron, queue, share, embed). Shipped apps can be published to the App Store + Google Play with auto-generated icons. Built on Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2 + KV + Durable Objects + Workers AI. Open source MIT.

## Core URLs

- [Home](https://stakgod.com): landing + comparison vs Lovable / Bolt / Hercules
- [Builder](https://stakgod.com/build): chat-to-app interface (auth required)
- [Templates](https://stakgod.com/templates): free starter apps to fork
- [Discover](https://stakgod.com/discover): public apps shipped by builders + leaderboards
- [Pricing](https://stakgod.com/pricing): Free / Hobby / Pro / Studio (monthly + annual)
- [Docs](https://stakgod.com/docs): primitive reference + quickstart
- [Changelog](https://stakgod.com/changelog): every commit, pulled live from git
- [Support](https://stakgod.com/support): "First 100 Founders Fund" tip jar — Stakgod takes 0%, 100% covers Apple/Google dev fees for builders
- [Source](https://github.com/heitkampnick23-art/stackgod): MIT-licensed, deploys to your own Cloudflare account in one click

## API

- POST `https://api.stakgod.com/auth/magic-link` — send sign-in email
- GET  `https://api.stakgod.com/auth/{google,apple}/start` — OAuth
- POST `https://api.stakgod.com/builder/chat` — streaming Claude builder (auth)
- GET  `https://api.stakgod.com/discover` — public apps feed
- GET  `https://api.stakgod.com/users/leaderboard` — top builders by views/revenue
- GET  `https://api.stakgod.com/changelog` — git-backed changelog
- GET  `https://api.stakgod.com/stats/public` — live ship counts

## sg.* primitives (auto-injected into every shipped app)

```
sg.db.{put, get, del, list}
sg.auth.{user, signIn, signOut}
sg.ai.{chat, stream, image}
sg.payments.{checkout, session}     // Stripe Connect, builder gets 80%, Stakgod 20%
sg.upload(file) / sg.uploads.*      // public R2 URL
sg.email.send                       // via Resend
sg.geo()                            // CF edge city/country/lat/lon
sg.notify.{ask, show, subscribe, unsubscribe, broadcast, toMe}  // RFC-8291 web push
sg.cron.{add, list, del}            // recurring scheduled tasks
sg.queue.{enqueue, list, cancel}    // one-shot delayed jobs
sg.share / sg.embed                 // viral surfaces
```
